case_title: YALDA FALLAHI VS. INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. ANTONIO PALAZZIO, APPEARING ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT, INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC. PARTIES ARE SWORN. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2009 IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2009 BY BRUCE E. CHAN. JUDGE BRUCE E. CHAN, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 514)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $855.00 FILED BY FALLAHI, YALDA AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 506 IS RESET TO MAY-01-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 514 BEFORE HONORABLE BRUCE E. CHAN, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FALLAHI, YALDA AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-19-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FALLAHI, YALDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL SPORT MOTORS, INC. $480.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $480.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
